idea-plugin.name: Treadmill Buddy
idea-plugin.description:
Treadmill Buddy is a digital stopwatch for developers who walk while they code.

Track under-desk treadmill sessions from inside IntelliJ IDEA with a large digital clock, floating movable clock, saved sessions, distance, steps, calories, and goal countdowns.

  • Marathon: open-ended count-up sessions.
  • Calorie burn: count down from the time needed to burn a calorie target.
  • KG burn: count down from the time needed to burn a target mass in kg.

The plugin includes selectable calorie algorithms, a Settings page for profile/defaults, live speed recalculation, live calorie-algorithm recalculation, saved session deletion, and configurable auto-pause after keyboard inactivity.

License: Apache License 2.0
idea-plugin.change-notes: • Initial Treadmill Buddy release with digital stopwatch, floating clock, saved sessions, calorie algorithms, countdown modes, and configurable profile settings.
